_comment: Line caps (wc -l semantics) enforced by scripts/check-file-size.mjs. AIO-320 holds the line on scripts/aios.mjs growth; AIO-315 ratchets this down per extraction PR. 2026-07-24: +20 (2802→2822) for the H3 decision-log privacy fix — resync gate (clean-check + push stamp) and contentShaForDecisionPush (hashes the redacted body so brain dedupe overwrites leaked rows). 2026-07-24: +8 (2822→2830, AIO-494) for the 1.12 evidence-kind push path — parseEvidenceRows/evidencePayloadContent/validateItemPayload thread fact + stakeholder_mention through buildPlan/cmdPush with the same admin tier-block as decisions. 2026-07-24: +5 (2830→2835, AIO-494 Bugbot M1 fix) — contentShaForDecisionPush generalized to contentShaForPush so fact/stakeholder_mention content_sha256 hashes the actual redacted wire payload (frontmatter+body+rows), not the raw file (which can still contain the admin-tier transcript body/quotes). Irreducible security logic kept in aios.mjs to avoid pulling node:crypto into the operator-loop bundle; FOLLOW-UP: extract the decision sync-state + evidence-payload helpers to a dedicated module and ratchet this back. 2026-07-24: +31 (2835→2866, AIOS-494 prettier pass) — purely mechanical: CI's prettier --check reflowed the compacted evidence-path lines; no new logic. The extraction FOLLOW-UP above stands.
